# Tanklr

## About
Tanklr is a home services company based in Oceanside, California, specializing in tankless water heater descaling and dryer vent cleaning. Founded by Alex Dressler and Clark, Tanklr serves homeowners across North County San Diego with flat-rate, transparent pricing and no hidden fees. We are locally owned and operated, with flat-rate transparent pricing and no hidden fees.

## Services and Pricing
- Tankless Water Heater Descaling: $249 flat rate per unit. Includes all hoses, pump, and descaling solution. Service report provided after every job.
- Dryer Vent Cleaning: $99–$199 depending on vent length and complexity. Includes drill-powered brush system, before and after inspection.

## Locations

- Del Mar, CA

Oceanside, Vista, Carlsbad, San Marcos, Escondido, Encinitas, Solana Beach, La Jolla, Del Mar, North County San Diego

## Key Facts
- Locally owned and operated in Oceanside, CA
- Fully insured — general liability coverage on every job
- Descaling specialists serving North County San Diego
- Flat-rate pricing — no hidden fees, no surprises
- Free estimate before every job
- Service report provided after every job
- Serves North County San Diego and surrounding areas
- Founders: Alex Dressler and Clark

## What Makes Us Different
Tanklr was built around two services most companies treat as an afterthought. We specialize exclusively in tankless water heater descaling and dryer vent cleaning — two critical maintenance jobs that protect your home, extend equipment life, and lower your energy bills. Because we focus only on these services, we do them right every time. Our pricing is transparent and flat-rate, so you always know exactly what you'll pay before we start.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does tankless water heater descaling cost?**
Tanklr charges $249 flat rate to descale one tankless water heater unit. This includes all equipment — hoses, pump, and descaling solution. There are no hidden fees or add-on charges.

**How much does dryer vent cleaning cost?**
Dryer vent cleaning costs $99 to $199 depending on the length and complexity of your vent run. We provide a free estimate before starting so you know the exact price upfront.

**What areas do you serve?**
We serve Oceanside, Vista, Carlsbad, San Marcos, Escondido, Encinitas, Solana Beach, La Jolla, Del Mar, and surrounding North County San Diego communities.

**How often should I descale my tankless water heater?**
Most manufacturers recommend descaling once a year. In areas with hard water — like much of San Diego County — annual descaling keeps your unit running efficiently and prevents costly damage.

**How often should dryer vents be cleaned?**
The National Fire Protection Association recommends cleaning dryer vents at least once a year. Clogged dryer vents are a leading cause of house fires and significantly increase drying time.

**Are you insured?**
Yes. Tanklr carries general liability insurance on every job.

**How do I book a service?**
You can book online at tanklr.com or call us at (858) 247-2017. Fill out the form on our website and we'll get back to you with a clear, upfront price.

**What's included in the tankless water heater descaling service?**
Our descaling service includes a full flush using food-grade descaling solution, all necessary hoses and pump equipment, and a written service report after the job is complete. We do not charge extra for supplies.

**How long does tankless water heater descaling take?**
A standard descaling job takes approximately 1 to 2 hours depending on the level of scale buildup.

**How long does dryer vent cleaning take?**
Most dryer vent cleanings are completed in 30 to 60 minutes.

**Why is dryer vent cleaning important?**
Lint buildup in dryer vents is a major fire hazard and forces your dryer to work harder, shortening its lifespan and raising your energy bills. A clean vent keeps your home safe and your dryer running efficiently.
